name: Greek Lemon Soup
recipeIngredient: 21 oz Condensed chicken rice soup (2 cans @ 10.5 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, combine the condensed chicken rice soup and water. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 6 to 8 minutes or until the soup is very hot.
2. Gradually, a little at a time, add some of the hot soup mixture to the well-beaten egg; stir until completely combined. Return the egg-soup mixture to the hot soup; stir to combine.
3. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until the soup thickens slightly. While the soup is heating, slice one of the two lemons into thin circles and squeeze the juice from the other lemon.
4. Just before serving, add the lemon slices and juice to the soup. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
